title: まずはじっくりお話を……♪

text_block_list.name: Suspicious Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text:
You there, young madam! I sense an inauspicious
aura hanging over you... If left to linger,
misfortune will certainly befall your mentor!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: My mentor? ...Could that be my trainer?

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Your Highness, please do not pay any mind to that sort
of poppycock!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
No, I believe it's best to be open-minded. Let's hear her
out at the very least. Besides, it's not time for training
just yet...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I see. You've made it quite clear that you really
are concerned for my well-being...

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text:
But of course. I cannot stand by as misfortune
terrorizes others... I won't even charge you, so
please rest easy and listen carefully.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how kind. To think you'd give me the time of
day when I'm neither customer nor acquaintance...

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text: Your Highness, we are running late!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm very sorry. But would you let me speak with
this lady for just a little bit longer, please?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I believe she's quite sincere. And if her prediction
is accurate, Trainer could be in danger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion listens attentively to the fortune
teller and ends up missing training entirely.
